articles.title: Google publishes exploit code threatening millions of Chromium users
articles.content: Google publishes exploit code before patch, reported 29 months earlier, is fixed.
articles.titleZh: 谷歌发布威胁数百万Chromium用户的漏洞代码
articles.contentZh: 在修复29个月前报告的补丁之前， Google发布了漏洞利用代码。

articles.title: In stunning display of stupid, secret CISA credentials found in public GitHub repo
articles.content: SSH keys, plaintext passwords, other sensitive data had been up since November 2025.
articles.titleZh: 在公共GitHub存储库中发现令人惊叹的愚蠢秘密CISA凭据
articles.contentZh: SSH密钥、明文密码和其他敏感数据自2025年11月以来一直在上升。

articles.title: Zero-day exploit completely defeats default Windows 11 BitLocker protections
articles.content: It's not entirely clear how the exploit works. Microsoft says it's investigating.
articles.titleZh: 零日漏洞完全击败默认的Windows 11 BitLocker保护
articles.contentZh: 目前尚不完全清楚漏洞是如何运作的。微软表示正在进行调查。

articles.title: Cisco announces record revenue and 4,000 layoffs in the same day
articles.content: Layoffs are "not a savings-driven restructure," CFO says.
articles.titleZh: 思科在同一天宣布创纪录的收入和4000次裁员
articles.contentZh: 首席财务官表示，裁员“不是由储蓄驱动的重组”。

articles.title: NYC Mayor Zohran Mamdani is launching a Twitch series
articles.content: New York City Mayor Zohran Mamdani is launching a streaming series on Twitch, in which he'll respond to questions the public have submitted via the chat, Polygon reports. The series is aptly titled "Talk with the People," and kicks off later today at 4PM ET. "With the launch of 'Talk with the People' we're bringing […]
articles.titleZh: 纽约市长Zohran Mamdani将推出Twitch系列
articles.contentZh: Polygon报道，纽约市市长Zohran Mamdani正在Twitch上推出一个流媒体系列，他将在其中回答公众通过聊天提交的问题。该系列节目恰如其分地命名为“与人交谈” ，今天晚些时候美国东部时间下午4点开始。“随着'与人交谈'的推出，我们将带来[…]

articles.title: ‘Fuck you, Bambu’: How one private message could change the face of 3D printing
articles.content: Bambu Lab makes the best, most accessible 3D printers yet, but that reputation is suddenly under siege. It all started when Paweł Jarczak received a private message from the company on Reddit asking him to delete his code. Now the 3D printing community is lining up behind Jarczak to fund a war against Bambu - […]
articles.titleZh: “Fuck you, Bambu” ：一条私人消息如何改变3D打印的面貌
articles.contentZh: Bambu Lab制造了迄今为止最好、最容易使用的3D打印机，但这种声誉突然受到了围攻。这一切始于Paweł Jarczak在Reddit上收到该公司的私人消息，要求他删除代码。现在， 3D打印社区正在支持Jarczak ，以资助对Bambu的战争- […]
